s3outposts.bucket.rule.CfnAbout: A container for an Amazon S3 on Outposts bucket lifecycle rule.

s3outposts.bucket.rule.AbortIncompleteMu.Description: The container for the abort incomplete multipart upload rule.

s3outposts.bucket.rule.ExpirationDate.Description: Specifies the expiration for the lifecycle of the object by specifying an expiry date.

s3outposts.bucket.rule.ExpirationInDays.Description: Specifies the expiration for the lifecycle of the object in the form of days that the object has been in the S3 on Outposts bucket.

s3outposts.bucket.rule.Filter.Description: The container for the filter of the lifecycle rule.

s3outposts.bucket.rule.Id.Description: The unique identifier for the lifecycle rule. The value can't be longer than 255 characters.

s3outposts.bucket.rule.Status.Description: If `Enabled`, the rule is currently being applied. If `Disabled`, the rule is not currently being applied.
